title: Hermes Agent Desktop + FREE APIs: This is ACTUALLY ONE OF THE BEST AGENT APPS!
summary: Hermes Agent Desktop is a new desktop application that provides a unified interface for Hermes Agent with features including session management, skill and tool catalogs, multi-platform messaging integrations, scheduled task execution, subagent orchestration, and multi-model provider selection. It transforms Hermes from a terminal-based tool into a visual desktop platform for agent automation and coding workflows.
